title: Film und Malerei
further_info: Recommended Reading - Katharina Bantleon: Vincent van Gogh im Spielfilm, Graz 2008 - Angela Dalle Vacche: Cinema and Painting. How Art is Used in Film, London 1996 - - Susan Felleman: Art in the Cinematic Imagination, Austin 2006 - Sandra Gibson/Laura Rascaroli (Hrsgg.): Theorizing Film Through Contemporary Art: Expanding Cinema, Amsterdam 2020 - Steven Jacobs/Lisa Colpaert: The Dark Galleries, Gent 2013 - Henry Keazor/Fabienne Liptay/Susanne Marschall: FilmKunst, Marburg 2011 - Kim Knowles and Marion Schmid (Hrsgg.): Cinematic Intermediality: Theory and Practice, Edinburgh 2021 - Allister Mactaggart: The Film Paintings of David Lynch, Bristol/Chicago 2010 - Gillian McIver: Art and the Historical Film: Between Realism and the Sublime, New York/London/Oxford/New Delhi/Sydney 2022 - Joëlle Moulin: Cinéma et Peinture, Paris 2011 - Laura M. Sager Eidt: Writing and Filming the Painting: Ekphrasis in Literature and Film, Amsterdam/New York 2008 - Jens Thiele: Das Kunstwerk im Film, Peter Lang 1976 - Luc Vacheri: Cinéma et peinture, Lassay-les-Châteaux 2007
